steps.title: Calculate the slope
steps.content: We have $f(0) = 3$ and $f(5) = 3$. The slope of the line is $\frac{3 - 3}{5 - 0} = 0$.

steps.title: Identify the horizontal line equation
steps.content: A linear function with slope 0 is a horizontal line of the form $f(x) = c$. Since $f(0) = 3$, the constant is 3, giving $f(x) = 3$. That matches choice C — C is correct.
